lines.speaker: Macer Varren
lines.text: Captain, traitor squads are sweeping left-to-right through the trench lane.

lines.speaker: Death Guard Captain
lines.text: Then we make them pay by meters. Hold this ground until extraction unlocks.

lines.speaker: Macer Varren
lines.text: Understood. I will relay marks to every loyalist still breathing.

lines.speaker: Vox Relay
lines.text: Encrypted burst from a former brother: heavy reinforcements are inbound.

lines.speaker: Death Guard Captain
lines.text: We are not former anything. We are the line. Prepare to receive impact.
